title: Citrusy Couscous Bowl
description: A flavorful and refreshing bowl filled with citrusy couscous, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Syrian spices.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the couscous according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the grated carrot and diced red bell pepper, cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Stir in the syrian spice blend and cook for an additional minute.
Fluff the cooked couscous with a fork and stir in the orange juice and zest.
Combine the cooked couscous mixture with the skillet contents and stir to combine.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
